title: Fix cart summary display issues

requirements.text: Debug and fix the CartSummary component to correctly display the item count and total price when cart items are present
acceptanceCriteria: Cart summary displays the correct number of items in the cart
Subtotal calculation accurately reflects all cart item prices and quantities
GST calculation (18% of subtotal) is accurate
Total price (subtotal + GST - discount) is calculated correctly
Cart summary updates immediately when items are added, removed, or quantities are changed

requirements.text: Verify that the useCart hook correctly manages cart state and provides accurate data to the CartSummary component
acceptanceCriteria: Cart state updates correctly when items are added or removed
Cart data persists across page refreshes via localStorage
Backend synchronization works properly when user is authenticated
Cart totals are calculated correctly in the hook

requirements.text: Ensure CartItemRow components correctly pass pricing and quantity data that feeds into the cart summary calculations
acceptanceCriteria: Item prices reflect any discounts correctly
Quantity updates trigger recalculation of item totals
Price data from gift packs is correctly retrieved and displayed

constraints: Do not modify the backend schema or main.mo
Maintain existing cart state management patterns in useCart hook
nonGoals: Adding new cart features beyond fixing the summary display
Changing the cart UI layout or styling
Modifying checkout flow or payment integration
